utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details (including costs):
- health_coverage: Includes physical and mental health insurance, policy names, monthly_cost provided, and details. Meets 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Includes home/contents insurance and equipment protection, monthly_cost provided, and details. Meets 'home/contents insurance with costs'. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Includes plan name, monthly_cost provided, and detailed coverage amounts. Meets 'travel insurance with costs'. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Provides an enhancement service (professional liability), monthly_cost, and details. Meets 'any enhancement services with costs'. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Provides monthly and annual cost, notes increase, payment schedule, and compliance status. Meets 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. Fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each item name in the final coverage plan to the closest exact offering in the ground-truth lists. Where the plan uses brand-specific labels (e.g., LifeFirst Standard Physical Health), I mapped to the corresponding standard plan from the same brand and category. Items not present in the ground-truth catalog (e.g., Technology Protection Add-on, PrimeTravel Premium Plan exists; Enhanced Professional Liability is not listed) were only rated if an exact match exists in the ground truth.
